text:
ほんとあっさり倒すよな……
いや、頼んだのはオレなんだけどさ。

どんどん鎮圧してったよなー！
レベルがちげーっていうの？
見てて爽快感があったぜ！

さすがに同じ動きはできねーけど
おたくと並んでも遜色ないくらいには
オレもなりてーな……

うっし、そうと決まれば修行だな！
あり

You seriously took 'em out, no sweat. I mean,
that's exactly what I asked you to do, but
still.

You just dropped 'em like a bag of dirt,
one after another, huh! You on a whole
'nother level or somethin'? I had a blast
just watchin' ya!

No way I'll be able to mimic that, but I hope I
can stand by you as an equal someday.

Aaall riiight! Which means I gotta get ta
practicin'! Thanks!
